testpoints.name: alu_none_passthrough
testpoints.description: ALU operation NONE (0x0): output equals alu_a_i directly

testpoints.name: alu_add_basic
testpoints.description: ALU operation ADD (0x4): basic addition of two small positive numbers

testpoints.name: alu_sub_basic
testpoints.description: ALU operation SUB (0x6): basic subtraction of two small positive numbers

testpoints.name: alu_and
testpoints.description: ALU operation AND (0x7): bitwise AND of alternating patterns

testpoints.name: alu_or
testpoints.description: ALU operation OR (0x8): bitwise OR of alternating patterns

testpoints.name: alu_xor
testpoints.description: ALU operation XOR (0x9): bitwise XOR of alternating patterns

testpoints.name: alu_shiftl_single_stage
testpoints.description: ALU SHIFTL (0x1): left shift by 4 (single barrel stage via bit 2)

testpoints.name: alu_shiftl_multi_stage
testpoints.description: ALU SHIFTL (0x1): left shift by 15 (multi-stage barrel: 1+2+4+8)

testpoints.name: alu_shiftr_logical
testpoints.description: ALU SHIFTR (0x2): logical right shift by 3 (multi-stage: 1+2)

testpoints.name: alu_shiftr_arith_negative
testpoints.description: ALU SHIFTR_ARITH (0x3): arithmetic right shift of negative number (MSB=1)

testpoints.name: alu_shiftr_arith_positive
testpoints.description: ALU SHIFTR_ARITH (0x3): arithmetic right shift of positive number (MSB=0)

testpoints.name: alu_less_than_unsigned_true
testpoints.description: ALU LESS_THAN (0xA): unsigned comparison where a < b, result=1

testpoints.name: alu_less_than_unsigned_false
testpoints.description: ALU LESS_THAN (0xA): unsigned comparison where a > b, result=0

testpoints.name: alu_less_than_signed_negative_vs_positive
testpoints.description: ALU LESS_THAN_SIGNED (0xB): signed comparison, negative < positive, result=1

testpoints.name: alu_less_than_signed_positive_vs_negative
testpoints.description: ALU LESS_THAN_SIGNED (0xB): signed comparison, positive > negative, result=0

testpoints.name: alu_add_overflow
testpoints.description: ALU ADD (0x4): addition with 32-bit overflow (0xFFFFFFFF + 1)

testpoints.name: alu_sub_underflow
testpoints.description: ALU SUB (0x6): subtraction causing underflow (0 - 1)

testpoints.name: alu_shiftl_zero_shift
testpoints.description: ALU SHIFTL (0x1): left shift by 0, output equals input

testpoints.name: alu_shiftl_max_shift
testpoints.description: ALU SHIFTL (0x1): left shift by 31 (all 5 barrel stages active)

testpoints.name: alu_none_zero
testpoints.description: ALU NONE (0x0): passthrough with zero inputs

testpoints.name: alu_add_zero_operands
testpoints.description: ALU ADD (0x4): zero plus zero

testpoints.name: alu_sub_equal_operands
testpoints.description: ALU SUB (0x6): subtraction of equal values, result zero

testpoints.name: alu_and_zero_mask
testpoints.description: ALU AND (0x7): AND with zero mask, result zero

testpoints.name: alu_or_allones_mask
testpoints.description: ALU OR (0x8): OR with all-ones mask, result all-ones

testpoints.name: alu_xor_self
testpoints.description: ALU XOR (0x9): XOR with self, result zero

testpoints.name: alu_add_large_boundary
testpoints.description: ALU ADD (0x4): addition of two large positive numbers near overflow

testpoints.name: alu_less_than_unsigned_max_vs_min
testpoints.description: ALU LESS_THAN (0xA): unsigned max (0xFFFFFFFF) vs min (0x00000000), result false

testpoints.name: alu_less_than_signed_min_vs_max
testpoints.description: ALU LESS_THAN_SIGNED (0xB): INT32_MIN vs INT32_MAX, signed comparison true

testpoints.name: alu_sub_negative_result
testpoints.description: ALU SUB (0x6): subtraction where a < b, result wraps to large unsigned value

testpoints.name: alu_shiftr_logical_msb_set
testpoints.description: ALU SHIFTR (0x2): logical right shift of value with MSB set, ensures zero-fill

testpoints.name: alu_default_opcode
testpoints.description: Unrecognized opcode (e.g. 0x5): should fall through to default passthrough

testpoints.name: alu_opcode_high_bits_ignored
testpoints.description: Opcode value with upper bits set (e.g. 0xFF): should be masked or ignored by switch
